isolation.guidanceSection: Flow Validator Guidance: Mini shell source/build surface
isolation.scope: Read-only inspection of delivered mini/ source, repo build artifacts, and shared validator evidence; no browser automation and no rerun of mini build/validate scripts.

commandsRun: Read/Grep repo guidance, mission contract, mini source files, mini/dist artifacts, and shared validator evidence.

python3: copied shared local-preview.html, validation-summary.json, and npm-test-build-validate.txt into mission evidence/mini-publish-shell/shell-navigation-visual/ and wrote .factory/validation/mini-publish-shell/user-testing/flows/shell-navigation-visual.json.

assertions.title: Home, Watch, and Account have distinct user-facing responsibilities in the polish shell
assertions.proofSummary: Primary shell registration, navigation metadata, page copy, and generated preview/summary all keep Home overview-first, Watch as the protected digest surface, and Account as the identity/help hub instead of collapsing the tabs into interchangeable content.

assertions.title: Surface-specific state copy stays honest without debug copy taking over
assertions.proofSummary: Home keeps signed-out, authenticated-loading, authenticated-empty, authenticated-error, and highlight states distinct; Watch keeps loading/auth-required/authenticated-empty/waiting/ready distinct; Account copy stays honest about signed-in versus signed-out posture, while runtime-boundary honesty stays secondary instead of replacing primary-surface messaging.

assertions.title: Signed-out users can navigate the shell while protected Watch content stays gated
assertions.proofSummary: The custom tab bar and primary-surface navigation helpers keep Home and Account reachable, while Watch explicitly renders an auth-required gate and withholds protected digest cards until a valid bearer session exists.

assertions.title: Account secondary pages support usable round-trip navigation
assertions.proofSummary: Account exposes Settings/About/Privacy/Help as real secondary routes, the shared secondary-page factory wires back and return actions, and returnToAccountSurface falls back safely when navigateBack cannot complete, so each leaf has a usable round trip to Account.

assertions.title: Authenticated Watch empty state stays distinct from auth-required and loading states
assertions.proofSummary: Watch state derivation maps authenticated users with no cards to authenticated-empty, renders dedicated authenticated-empty copy and a separate “No protected cards yet” card, and keeps that state separate from auth-required, loading, waiting, and ready both in source and generated proof.

assertions.title: The shell visual system keeps objective dark-premium cues across primary surfaces
assertions.proofSummary: The shared shell stylesheet defines the dark root canvas, elevated cards, restrained green accent usage for primary actions/active navigation, and shared typography/spacing tokens, and Home/Watch/Account all import that stylesheet; the generated proof and validation summary restate the same objective visual tokens.

summary: Validated 6 assigned shell navigation/state/visual assertions from committed mini/ source plus generated proof: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
